{{Quote|Karia Ver Seryan. […] Widow of one Chantu Solk, a rather sharp fellow I knew pretty well in the old days. He was a ship broker who made his money knowing which side to bet on in the war against the Empire—and kept his money by knowing when to change his bets.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>}}
'''Chantu Solk''' was an old acquaintance of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. He was a shrewd [[Starship/Legends|starship]] broker who made his fortune during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], playing both sides when necessary, but favoring the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Eventually he grew very sick. With only a few months to live, he entered into a bond with the [[life-bearer]] [[Karia Ver Seryan]] and lived comfortably for three more years under her Support. Lando, unaware of Karia's true nature, approached her with a [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]] proposal [[18 ABY/Legends|five years later]].
